title: Create More Fps
description: Create but with High FPS — All the power of Create, turbocharged. Packed with every major Create addon, stunning shaders, QoL mods, and performance boosters like Sodium, Lithium, GPU Booster, and Entity Culling. Build bigger, run smoother, and create witho
body:
Create but with High FPS is the ultimate modpack for Minecraft creators, engineers, and builders who want the full Create experience — but without performance compromises. Designed exclusively for NeoForge 1.21.1, this modpack blends the creativity of Create with powerful optimizations to deliver smooth, lag-free gameplay.

This pack includes an extensive collection of Create addons, expanding your building, automation, and engineering possibilities. With mods like Create: Ironworks, Create: Dreams & Desires, Create: Ultimate Factory, and many more, the potential for creativity is limitless.

Performance is a key focus. This modpack comes with Sodium, Lithium, GPU Booster, Entity Culling, and other advanced optimization mods to keep your FPS high even during the most complex builds. You’ll enjoy seamless gameplay without lag, stuttering, or long load times :)

Features include:

1) All major Create mods and popular addons for unmatched creativity

2) Powerful optimization tools for smoother gameplay

3) Built-in resource packs and shaders for immersive visuals

4) Quality-of-life (QoL) mods for convenience and immersion

5) Full client and server support

Whether you’re building massive factories, intricate redstone machines, or breathtaking worlds, Create but with High FPS delivers the tools, performance, and beauty to bring your vision to life.

NEOFORGE ONLY — Minecraft 1.21.1
